concerns.text: The plan explicitly resolves the lack of a verified dataset for 'morally ambiguous Visual Genome' images by using 'synthetic/stubbed dataset generation' and 'proxy images' (geometric compositions). This violates the core research question which requires testing the effect of visual salience on *moral judgments of simulated scenarios*. Geometric proxies lack the semantic content (moral ambiguity) required to elicit the dependent variable (blame). The plan admits the statistical engine is validated against a *different* dataset (ANOVA results) rather than the actual experimental data. This renders the proposed pipeline incapable of answering the research question as the 'stimuli' do not possess the necessary semantic properties to generate the required behavioral response.
